title: Proof-of-reading review coverage
goal: Measure how much of a PR or task-relevant change surface was actually cited by an agent review, and expose uncovered ranges without treating citation coverage as correctness proof.

acceptance.assertion: A report computes cited vs changed/task-relevant ranges and lists uncovered material.
Coverage thresholds are configurable and advisory unless an external Bureau/CI policy explicitly gates on them.
Coverage never establishes review correctness, test sufficiency, security correctness or merge readiness.
Bureau can later consume the coverage report as evidence without making RepoBrief a merge authority.

metadata.outcome: Implemented in Lenskit PR #920: RepoBrief now has a read-only proof-of-reading coverage report that compares delta-context relevant ranges with review citations, lists uncovered ranges and keeps thresholds advisory unless external policy gates on them.
validation: Lenskit PR #920 GitHub CI passed after final head: pytest-full, ruff, CodeQL, doc-freshness, planning-registration, validate-merge-meta, contract checks, reusable fixture validation and webui-js-tests.
Codex P2 feedback was addressed before merge: root-level file citations, parent path plus nested source_range JSON citations, and line-intersection coverage accounting.
Local before merge: 111 focused RepoBrief/review-coverage/delta/context/source-citation/access/preflight tests passed.
Local before merge: targeted ruff-ci check passed.
Local before merge: planning-registration ratchet reported no new drift.
Local before merge: doc-freshness inspect PASS.
Local before merge: git diff --check origin/main...HEAD passed.
Manual CLI smoke: delta-context compile followed by review-coverage compile returned status pass, writes=[] and Bureau gate requires external policy.
Post-merge on origin/main 6427f9ce3249aabecc1e4a3c8fd22a0b0051c727: same 111 tests passed, targeted ruff passed, planning-registration no new drift, doc-freshness PASS and diff-check pass.

verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t006-coverage: repobrief.review_coverage computes cited vs relevant changed ranges from delta-context output and lists uncovered_ranges.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t006-thresholds: min_range_coverage is configurable and advisory; CLI exits nonzero only for invalid input, and report declares external_policy_required_to_gate=true.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t006-non-proof: The report declares non-claims for review correctness, test sufficiency, security correctness, runtime behavior, regression absence and merge readiness.
verified_acceptance.rpu-v1-t006-bureau-fit: The report emits a bureau_evidence boundary identifying it as evidence_signal, advisory by default and not a merge authority.
